race.comment: Tough Maiden where some of the leading chances have drawn out. JUMP AROUND (5) from the in-form Ryan & Alexiou yard and strips fitter after his debut third over 1300m at Wyong. Well placed for this from the inside gate with the key jockey change. Hard to hold out. STAR HALF (9) much better performance at his second career start when he raced closer for a fighting third over 1200m at Gosford. Will appreciate the bigger track from the low draw. Genuine top-three player. CHATTERLEY (11) Group Three placed filly desperate to shed her Maiden tag. Closed quickly on resumption for a nose second over 1300m at Wyong. Can sit off the fast tempo and swoop late. SAMAKA (8) was heavily supported on debut when taken to the front for an unlucky second over 1300m at Canberra. Can come on strongly with that run and stays in the mix from the wider draw. The chances don't end there.
